_comment: DeepSpeed ZeRO Stage 3 — tuned for 8× A100 80GB, Mixtral 8x7B full fine-tuning

zero_optimization._comment_stage3: Stage 3 shards model params + gradients + optimizer states across all GPUs.

offload_optimizer._comment: CPU offload disabled — 8× A100 has enough combined VRAM (640 GB).
offload_optimizer._comment2: Enable with device=cpu only if you run on fewer GPUs and hit OOM.

offload_param._comment: Param CPU offload disabled — would halve training speed unnecessarily.
